description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with a dark, weathered appearance, reinforced by several horizontal metal hoops. The surface of the barrel is adorned with two large, colorful graphics: one side features a frothy beer mug, while the opposite side displays a bright red apple with a green leaf. The top of the barrel is flat and appears to be made of the same wooden planks as the sides, suggesting it is sealed. The wood grain and metal bands give the barrel a rustic, sturdy look, typical of containers used for storing liquids or produce. The graphics suggest it may be used for decorative or thematic purposes, possibly in a bar, pub, or urban outdoor setting.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal hoops, featuring large graphics of a beer mug and an apple on its sides.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with the apple graphic partially visible and the wood grain and metal hoops prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the beer mug graphic, with the wood and metal bands clearly visible.
description_view_2: The barrel is seen from a side angle, showing mostly the wooden surface and metal hoops, with the beer mug graphic partially visible.
description_view_3: The apple graphic is fully visible, set against the dark wooden planks and metal hoops.
